name: Car Booking Auto Revenue
script:
existing = frappe.db.exists("Revenue", {"booking_reference": doc.name, "notes": ["like", "%إيراد دفعة حجز%"]})
if not existing and frappe.utils.flt(doc.down_payment):
    revenue = frappe.new_doc('Revenue')
    revenue.date = doc.date or frappe.utils.today()
    revenue.booking_reference = doc.name
    revenue.receiver = doc.sales_employee
    revenue.amount = frappe.utils.flt(doc.down_payment)
    revenue.car = doc.car or ""
    revenue.customer_name = doc.customer_name_fetched or ""
    revenue.notes = f"إيراد دفعة حجز سيارة - العقد {doc.name}"
    if doc.sales_employee:
        target_date = doc.date or frappe.utils.today()
        shift = frappe.db.get_value('Shift Assignment', {'employee': doc.sales_employee, 'docstatus': 1, 'start_date': ['<=', target_date], 'end_date': ['>=', target_date]}, 'shift_type')
        if shift:
            revenue.shift = shift
    revenue.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    frappe.msgprint(f"تم تسجيل قيد إيراد {revenue.name} بمبلغ {revenue.amount} - السيارة: {revenue.car}", indicator="green", alert=True)

name: Car Booking Receipt
script:
existing = frappe.db.exists("Revenue", {"booking_reference": doc.booking, "notes": ["like", "%استلام%"]})
if not existing and frappe.utils.flt(doc.total_cost):
    revenue = frappe.new_doc('Revenue')
    revenue.date = doc.receiving_date or frappe.utils.today()
    revenue.booking_reference = doc.booking
    revenue.receiver = doc.sales_employee
    revenue.amount = frappe.utils.flt(doc.total_cost)
    revenue.notes = f"إيراد استلام سيارة - {doc.name}"
    if doc.sales_employee:
        target_date = doc.receiving_date or frappe.utils.today()
        shift = frappe.db.get_value('Shift Assignment', {'employee': doc.sales_employee, 'docstatus': 1, 'start_date': ['<=', target_date], 'end_date': ['>=', target_date]}, 'shift_type')
        if shift:
            revenue.shift = shift
    revenue.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    frappe.msgprint(f"تم تسجيل قيد إيراد {revenue.name} بمبلغ {revenue.amount}", indicator="green", alert=True)

name: dashboard_stats
script:
total_cars = frappe.db.count("Car", {"status": ["!=", "مجمدة"]})
frozen_cars = frappe.db.count("Car", {"status": "مجمدة"})

statuses = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count
    FROM `tabCar`
    GROUP BY status
""", as_dict=True)

status_map = {s.status: s["count"] for s in statuses}

branches = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT
        b.name as branch_name,
        b.city,
        b.branch_manager,
        COUNT(c.name) as car_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'متوفر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as available,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'محجوز' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as reserved,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'مؤجر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rented,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'داخل الصيانة' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_maintenance,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'جاهز للتسليم' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ready,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'مجمدة' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as frozen
    FROM `tabCar Branch` b
    LEFT JOIN `tabVehicle Fleet` f ON f.branch = b.name
    LEFT JOIN `tabCar` c ON c.fleet = f.name
    GROUP BY b.name
""", as_dict=True)

fleets = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT
        f.name as fleet_name,
        f.branch,
        f.fleet_manager,
        COUNT(c.name) as car_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'متوفر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as available,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'مؤجر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rented
    FROM `tabVehicle Fleet` f
    LEFT JOIN `tabCar` c ON c.fleet = f.name AND c.status != 'مجمدة'
    GROUP BY f.name
""", as_dict=True)

revenue = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT
        IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) as total_revenue,
        COUNT(*) as payment_count
    FROM `tabRevenue`
""", as_dict=True)[0]

monthly_revenue = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) as total
    FROM `tabRevenue`
    WHERE MONTH(date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(date) = YEAR(CURDATE())
""")[0][0]

active_bookings = frappe.db.count("Car Booking", {"docstatus": 1})

frappe.response["message"] = {
    "total_cars": total_cars,
    "frozen_cars": frozen_cars,
    "status_map": status_map,
    "branches": branches,
    "fleets": fleets,
    "total_revenue": revenue.total_revenue,
    "monthly_revenue": monthly_revenue,
    "payment_count": revenue.payment_count,
    "active_bookings": active_bookings,
}

name: car_profitability
script:
month = frappe.form_dict.get("month")
year = frappe.form_dict.get("year")

date_filter_rev = ""
date_filter_oil = ""
date_filter_exp = ""
date_filter_tax = ""

if month and year:
    m = int(month)
    y = int(year)
    date_filter_rev = "AND MONTH(r.date) = " + str(m) + " AND YEAR(r.date) = " + str(y)
    date_filter_oil = "AND MONTH(o.`التاريخ`) = " + str(m) + " AND YEAR(o.`التاريخ`) = " + str(y)
    date_filter_exp = "AND MONTH(e.`التاريخ`) = " + str(m) + " AND YEAR(e.`التاريخ`) = " + str(y)
    date_filter_tax = "AND MONTH(rc.receiving_date) = " + str(m) + " AND YEAR(rc.receiving_date) = " + str(y)

query = (
    "SELECT c.name, c.brand, c.model, c.plate_no, c.status,"
    " IFNULL(rev.total_revenue, 0) as total_revenue,"
    " IFNULL(oil.total_cost, 0) as total_periodic,"
    " IFNULL(exp.total_cost, 0) as total_expense,"
    " IFNULL(tax.total_taxes, 0) as total_taxes,"
    " IFNULL(rev.total_revenue, 0) - IFNULL(oil.total_cost, 0) - IFNULL(exp.total_cost, 0) - IFNULL(tax.total_taxes, 0) as net_profit"
    " FROM `tabCar` c"
    " LEFT JOIN ("
    "   SELECT cb.car, SUM(CASE WHEN r.payment_type = 'قبض' THEN r.amount WHEN r.payment_type = 'دفع' THEN -r.amount ELSE 0 END) as total_revenue"
    "   FROM `tabRevenue` r"
    "   JOIN `tabCar Booking` cb ON r.booking_reference = cb.name"
    "   WHERE 1=1 " + date_filter_rev +
    "   GROUP BY cb.car"
    " ) rev ON rev.car = c.name"
    " LEFT JOIN ("
    "   SELECT o.car, SUM(o.cost) as total_cost"
    "   FROM `tabPeriodic Maintenance` o"
    "   WHERE o.docstatus = 1 " + date_filter_oil +
    "   GROUP BY o.car"
    " ) oil ON oil.car = c.name"
    " LEFT JOIN ("
    "   SELECT e.car, SUM(e.`التكلفة`) as total_cost"
    "   FROM `tabCar Expense` e"
    "   WHERE e.docstatus = 1 " + date_filter_exp +
    "   GROUP BY e.car"
    " ) exp ON exp.car = c.name"
    " LEFT JOIN ("
    "   SELECT rc.car, SUM(rc.spending_tax + rc.local_tax) as total_taxes"
    "   FROM `tabCar Receipt` rc"
    "   WHERE rc.docstatus = 1 " + date_filter_tax +
    "   GROUP BY rc.car"
    " ) tax ON tax.car = c.name"
    " ORDER BY net_profit DESC"
)

cars = frappe.db.sql(query, as_dict=True)
frappe.response["message"] = cars

name: profit_summary
script:
date_from = frappe.form_dict.get("date_from")
date_to = frappe.form_dict.get("date_to")

total_revenue = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_type=%s THEN amount WHEN payment_type=%s THEN -amount ELSE 0 END),0) FROM `tabRevenue`", ("قبض", "دفع"))[0][0]
total_periodic = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(cost),0) FROM `tabPeriodic Maintenance` WHERE docstatus=1")[0][0]
total_expense = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(`التكلفة`),0) FROM `tabCar Expense` WHERE docstatus=1")[0][0]
total_taxes = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(spending_tax+local_tax),0) FROM `tabCar Receipt` WHERE docstatus=1")[0][0]
total_withdrawals = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0) FROM `tabCash Transaction` WHERE docstatus=1")[0][0]
total_costs = total_periodic + total_expense
total_profit = total_revenue - total_costs

period_profit = None
period_revenue = 0
period_periodic = 0
period_expense = 0
period_taxes = 0
period_withdrawals = 0
if date_from and date_to:
    period_revenue = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_type=%s THEN amount WHEN payment_type=%s THEN -amount ELSE 0 END),0) FROM `tabRevenue` WHERE date BETWEEN %s AND %s", ("قبض", "دفع", date_from, date_to))[0][0]
    period_periodic = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(cost),0) FROM `tabPeriodic Maintenance` WHERE docstatus=1 AND `التاريخ` BETWEEN %s AND %s", (date_from, date_to))[0][0]
    period_expense = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(`التكلفة`),0) FROM `tabCar Expense` WHERE docstatus=1 AND `التاريخ` BETWEEN %s AND %s", (date_from, date_to))[0][0]
    period_taxes = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(spending_tax+local_tax),0) FROM `tabCar Receipt` WHERE docstatus=1 AND receiving_date BETWEEN %s AND %s", (date_from, date_to))[0][0]
    period_withdrawals = frappe.db.sql("SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0) FROM `tabCash Transaction` WHERE docstatus=1 AND date BETWEEN %s AND %s", (date_from, date_to))[0][0]
    period_costs = period_periodic + period_expense
    period_profit = period_revenue - period_costs

frappe.response["message"] = {
    "total_revenue": total_revenue,
    "total_periodic": total_periodic,
    "total_expense": total_expense,
    "total_taxes": total_taxes,
    "total_withdrawals": total_withdrawals,
    "total_profit": total_profit,
    "period_revenue": period_revenue,
    "period_periodic": period_periodic,
    "period_expense": period_expense,
    "period_taxes": period_taxes,
    "period_withdrawals": period_withdrawals,
    "period_profit": period_profit,
}

name: branch_dashboard_stats
script:
user = frappe.session.user

# Find user's branch
user_branch = frappe.db.get_value("Car Branch", {"branch_manager": user}, "name")
if not user_branch and frappe.session.user == "Administrator":
    user_branch = frappe.db.get_value("Car Branch", {}, "name")

if not user_branch:
    frappe.response["message"] = {"error": "لا يوجد فرع مرتبط بحسابك", "branches": [], "fleets": [], "status_map": {}, "total_cars": 0, "frozen_cars": 0}
else:
    branch_filter = f"AND f.branch = '{user_branch}'"

    statuses = frappe.db.sql(f"""
        SELECT c.status, COUNT(*) as count
        FROM `tabCar` c
        JOIN `tabVehicle Fleet` f ON c.fleet = f.name
        WHERE f.branch = %s
        GROUP BY c.status
    """, user_branch, as_dict=True)

    status_map = {s.status: s["count"] for s in statuses}
    total_cars = sum(v for k, v in status_map.items() if k != "مجمدة")
    frozen_cars = status_map.get("مجمدة", 0)

    branches = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            b.name as branch_name, b.city,
            COUNT(c.name) as car_count,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'متوفر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as available,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'محجوز' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as reserved,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'مؤجر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rented,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'داخل الصيانة' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_maintenance,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'جاهز للتسليم' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ready,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'مجمدة' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as frozen
        FROM `tabCar Branch` b
        LEFT JOIN `tabVehicle Fleet` f ON f.branch = b.name
        LEFT JOIN `tabCar` c ON c.fleet = f.name
        WHERE b.name = %s
        GROUP BY b.name
    """, user_branch, as_dict=True)

    fleets = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            f.name as fleet_name, f.branch,
            COUNT(c.name) as car_count,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'متوفر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as available,
            SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'مؤجر' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rented
        FROM `tabVehicle Fleet` f
        LEFT JOIN `tabCar` c ON c.fleet = f.name AND c.status != 'مجمدة'
        WHERE f.branch = %s
        GROUP BY f.name
    """, user_branch, as_dict=True)

    frappe.response["message"] = {
        "branch_name": user_branch,
        "total_cars": total_cars,
        "frozen_cars": frozen_cars,
        "status_map": status_map,
        "branches": branches,
        "fleets": fleets,
    }

name: branch_car_profitability
script:
user = frappe.session.user

user_branch = frappe.db.get_value("Car Branch", {"branch_manager": user}, "name")
if not user_branch and frappe.session.user == "Administrator":
    user_branch = frappe.db.get_value("Car Branch", {}, "name")

if not user_branch:
    frappe.response["message"] = []
else:
    cars = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT
            c.name, c.brand, c.model, c.plate_no, c.status,
            IFNULL(oil.total_cost, 0) as total_periodic,
            IFNULL(exp.total_cost, 0) as total_expense
        FROM `tabCar` c
        JOIN `tabVehicle Fleet` f ON c.fleet = f.name
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT o.car, SUM(o.cost) as total_cost
            FROM `tabPeriodic Maintenance` o WHERE o.docstatus = 1
            GROUP BY o.car
        ) oil ON oil.car = c.name
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT e.car, SUM(e.`التكلفة`) as total_cost
            FROM `tabCar Expense` e WHERE e.docstatus = 1
            GROUP BY e.car
        ) exp ON exp.car = c.name
        WHERE f.branch = %s
        ORDER BY c.name
    """, user_branch, as_dict=True)

    frappe.response["message"] = cars

name: get_user_branch
